name: Browder long-term OSKM physiological-aging mouse study
summary: Long-term partial-reprogramming regimen study in physiologically aging wild-type mice, comparing onset timings and durations with tissue, epigenetic-clock, transcriptomic, metabolic, and organism-level readouts.
model_system: Physiologically aging wild-type mice treated with long-term partial OSKM reprogramming regimens
